meaning: conferences[复]帕格沃什会议("科学和世界事务会议"的别称)
examples: He was a member of the Pugwash Council from 1988 to 1996.
Mikhail Gorbachev, Yasser Arafat and anti-nuclear activists like the Pugwash Conference and International Physicians for the Prevention of Nuclear War come to mind.
Foi membro do Pugwash Council de 1988 a 1996.
